post.content:
Had another episode of interviewing with a bunch of incompetent folks. A non FAANG firm. I had talks with 4 senior folks.

Initially the position was mentioned as an **Architect**.

In a first discussion with the HM, he mentioned that it is now for a **Principal Engineer** (one level down). It was a red flag, but I still went ahead.

I got interview scheduled which mentioned **Architect**!!

The interviewers were all thinking that it was for **Architect** position.

The discussions went great, except for 2. One dude kept pushing me on why we are using `rust` for something like a control plane design. Even after mentioning multiple times that we evaluated all possibilities, and rust seemed best suited due to internal libraries and frameworks were already in `rust`, he was arrogant enough to say : “oh this will fail”, “this is designed for failure”, "this will not scale", without actually mentioning any reasoning behind those atrocious claims.

The other dude was supposed to take a behavioral interview. He joined 10 minutes late. And in the last 15 minutes, he jumped to “design uber”. I was surprised. I still did it pretty well.

A week went by, and they didn’t even bother to update me on anything. I mailed them asking if there’s an update. A dry reply comes “oh unfortunately it didn’t work out for **Architect**.” WTH, wasn’t it PE position anyway? Plus, you were expecting to just ghost me.

On interview content: they were pretty lame and very doable. There was nothing that I could have done *better*. I was very happy and satisfied with my answers.
You dodged a bullet. I hate being negative or prejudiced, but every time I talk to an \u201Carchitect,\u201D I\u2019m like\u2026 ugh.
